what_it_does: Defines an SVG play-circle icon: a circular outline centered in a 24x24 viewBox with a right-pointing filled play triangle inside.
observations: Uses an inline SVG with xmlns and viewBox="0 0 24 24".
Sets fill="none" on the root SVG and stroke="currentColor" for inherited color styling.
Draws an outlined circle at cx="12", cy="12", r="9".
Draws the play mark as a closed path from M10 8 to L16 12 to L10 16, filled with currentColor.
standouts: Circle outline paired with a filled triangular play mark.
conventions: Follows common icon SVG conventions: 24x24 viewBox, currentColor, rounded line caps, rounded joins.
Uses stroke-width="1.5" for the outlined geometry.
Keeps the asset self-contained with no external references.
notes: A compact file-local SVG asset for a play button inside a circle.
questions: Is the inner play triangle intended to inherit the root stroke as well as use fill="currentColor"?
purpose_vs_actual: The file path and name indicate a play-circle SVG icon, and the content draws a play-circle SVG icon.
intention_signals: It appears intended to provide a reusable play-control icon that can adopt surrounding text or UI color through currentColor.
contribution: Contributes a compact, scalable play-in-circle icon asset with currentColor styling suitable for reuse in UI surfaces.
summary_for_embedding: This is a 24x24 SVG icon file defining a circular outline with a filled right-pointing play triangle using currentColor styling.
intention_for_embedding: It was made to represent a reusable play action or media control within a design system icon set.
